hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.go ]]; then cd "$(dirname "$FILE")" && go vet ./... 2>&1 | head -20; elif [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/frontend" && npx eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -20; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.go ]]; then ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); REL=${FILE#$ROOT/}; if [[ "$REL" == connector/* ]] && grep -qE "github.com/noui/platform/(dataaccess|intelligence|crm|correspondence|dataquality|knowledgebase)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "LAYER VIOLATION: connector/ must not import from platform/ services"; exit 1; elif [[ "$REL" == platform/* ]] && grep -q "github.com/noui/platform/connector" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "LAYER VIOLATION: platform/ must not import from connector/"; exit 1; fi; fi'
bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && echo "Pre-push: verifying frontend build..." && cd frontend && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5'
